commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 22:10 He shall build a house for my name; and he shall be my son, and I will be his father; and I will establish the throne of his kingdom over Israel forever. See 2 Kings vii. (Menochius) A son. The crimes into which Solomon fell, hinder us from explaining this literally of him. Paul refers the expression to Jesus Christ, Hebrews i. (Calmet) St. Augustine (de C. ) observes that the promises were not perfectly fulfilled in Solomon.
